DEFENDANT 1177 MARKET STREET LLC AND GREYSTAR CA, INC. ARE PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY ERIC WIESMAN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
